title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Lenovo India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Lenovo India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenovo India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Lenovo India:
Lenovo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India!
jsonLd.skills: Machine Learning, JavaScript, Python, React, Git, Node.js, SQL, AWS
